sentences.target: Hier in der Gegend kennt man sich.
sentences.reading: /hiːɐ̯ ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈɡeːɡənt kɛnt man zɪç/

translations.de: Hier in der Gegend kennt man sich.
translations.ipa: /hiːɐ̯ ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈɡeːɡənt kɛnt man zɪç/
translations.en: People know each other around here.
translations.fr: Ici, tout le monde se connaît.
translations.it: Da queste parti tutti si conoscono.
translations.zh-Hans: 这附近的人彼此都认识。
translations.ru: У нас здесь все друг друга знают.
translations.pt: Por aqui todo mundo se conhece.
translations.he: כאן בסביבה כולם מכירים אחד את השני.
translations.vi: Ở đây ai cũng biết nhau.
translations.hi: यहाँ के लोग एक-दूसरे को जानते हैं.
translations.el: Εδώ γύρω όλοι γνωρίζονται μεταξύ τους.
translations.id: Di sekitar sini orang-orang saling kenal.
translations.ro: Pe aici, oamenii se cunosc între ei.
translations.ja: この辺りではみんな顔見知りです。

tokens.explanation: Locative adverb setting the spatial frame of the clause.
Preposition heading a PP; here indicates static location and governs dative.
Definite article, feminine dative singular; determiner for 'Gegend'.
Common noun, feminine dative singular; object of the preposition 'in'.
Main verb, 3rd person singular present indicative.
Impersonal pronoun functioning as generic subject (3sg).
Reflexive pronoun (accusative) used here for reciprocal meaning with 'man' ('know each other').

sentences.target: Die Gegend wirkt abends sehr ruhig.

translations.de: Die Gegend wirkt abends sehr ruhig.
translations.en: The area feels very quiet in the evenings.
translations.es: Por las noches, la zona está muy tranquila.
translations.fr: Le soir, le quartier est très calme.
translations.it: Di sera, la zona è molto tranquilla.
translations.pt: À noite, a região fica bem tranquila.
translations.vi: Buổi tối khu này rất yên tĩnh.
translations.ar: في المساء تكون المنطقة هادئة جدًا.
translations.nl: 's avonds is het hier heel rustig.
translations.hi: शाम को यह इलाका बहुत शांत रहता है.
translations.el: Τα βράδια η περιοχή είναι πολύ ήσυχη.
translations.nb: Om kvelden er det veldig rolig her.
translations.id: Pada malam hari, daerah ini sangat tenang.
translations.sv: På kvällarna är det väldigt lugnt här.
translations.da: Om aftenen er her meget stille.
translations.ja: 夕方になるとこの辺りはとても静かです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine nominative singular; determiner of the subject.
Subject noun, feminine nominative singular.
Main verb, 3rd person singular present; copular-like 'seems/appears', taking a predicative complement.
Temporal adverb modifying 'wirkt'.
Degree adverb intensifying the predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective serving as the complement of 'wirkt'.

sentences.target: Ich suche eine ruhigere Gegend zum Wohnen.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈzuːxə ˈaɪ̯nə ˈʁuːɪɡəʁə ˈɡeːɡənt tsʊm ˈvoːnən/

translations.de: Ich suche eine ruhigere Gegend zum Wohnen.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈzuːxə ˈaɪ̯nə ˈʁuːɪɡəʁə ˈɡeːɡənt tsʊm ˈvoːnən/
translations.en: I'm looking for a quieter area to live.
translations.es: Busco una zona más tranquila para vivir.
translations.fr: Je cherche un quartier plus calme pour vivre.
translations.it: Cerco una zona più tranquilla dove vivere.
translations.ko: 살기 더 조용한 동네를 찾고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在找一个更安静的地方住。
translations.yue: 我想搵個再靜啲嘅地方住。
translations.ru: Ищу более тихий район для жизни.
translations.pt: Estou procurando uma região mais tranquila para morar.
translations.he: אני מחפש אזור שקט יותר לגור בו.
translations.tr: Yaşamak için daha sakin bir bölge arıyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm một khu yên tĩnh hơn để sống.
translations.ar: أبحث عن منطقة أكثر هدوءًا للعيش فيها.
translations.nl: Ik zoek een rustigere buurt om in te wonen.
translations.uk: Я шукаю тихіший район для життя.
translations.hi: मैं रहने के लिए एक अधिक शांत इलाका ढूँढ़ रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Ψάχνω μια πιο ήσυχη περιοχή για να μείνω.
translations.nb: Jeg leter etter et roligere område å bo i.
translations.id: Saya mencari daerah yang lebih tenang untuk tinggal.
translations.sv: Jag letar efter ett lugnare område att bo i.
translations.ro: Caut o zonă mai liniștită în care să locuiesc.
translations.da: Jeg søger et roligere område at bo i.
translations.ja: 住むのにもっと静かな場所を探しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject.
Main verb, 1st person singular present indicative.
Indefinite article, feminine accusative singular; determiner of 'Gegend'.
Comparative adjective, feminine accusative singular; attributive modifier of 'Gegend'.
Direct object noun, feminine accusative singular.
Contracted form of 'zu dem'; preposition introducing a purpose phrase.
Nominalized verb functioning as a noun; complement of 'zum' indicating purpose.

sentences.target: In der Gegend gibt es einen schönen Park.
sentences.reading: /ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈɡeːɡənt ɡɪpt ɛs ˈaɪ̯nən ˈʃøːnən paʁk/

translations.de: In der Gegend gibt es einen schönen Park.
translations.ipa: /ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈɡeːɡənt ɡɪpt ɛs ˈaɪ̯nən ˈʃøːnən paʁk/
translations.en: There is a nice park in the area.
translations.es: En la zona hay un parque bonito.
translations.fr: Il y a un joli parc dans le quartier.
translations.it: C'è un bel parco in zona.
translations.zh-Hans: 这附近有一个很漂亮的公园。
translations.ru: В этом районе есть красивый парк.
translations.pt: Há um parque bonito na região.
translations.tr: Bu civarda güzel bir park var.
translations.vi: Khu này có một công viên đẹp.
translations.ar: في هذه المنطقة توجد حديقة جميلة.
translations.nl: Er is een mooi park in de buurt.
translations.uk: У цьому районі є гарний парк.
translations.hu: A környéken van egy szép park.
translations.hi: इस इलाके में एक अच्छा पार्क है.
translations.el: Στην περιοχή υπάρχει ένα όμορφο πάρκο.
translations.nb: I området findes det en fin park.
translations.id: Di daerah ini ada taman yang bagus.
translations.sv: I området finns en fin park.
translations.ro: În zonă există un parc frumos.
translations.da: I området er der en fin park.
translations.ja: この辺りには素敵な公園があります。

Noun, feminine dative singular; object of the preposition 'In'.
